name: Green Beans with Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw regular rice, cooked & drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Add the flour and stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add the milk, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
4. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils and thickens.
5. Reduce the heat to low and stir in the salt, dill weed, and grated Swiss cheese until the cheese melts.
6. Add the drained green beans and cooked rice to the saucepan.
7. Stir in the chopped parsley.
8. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes or until heated through.
